data.reasoningText:
The solution isn't actually building the individual projects. The `.sln` file is missing the configuration mapping section `ProjectConfigurationPlatforms` inside the `Global` section. Without this mapping, MSBuild doesn't know which projects to build for which configuration. Let me check the metaproj to confirm.

Actually wait - looking at the solution file again:

```
GlobalSection(SolutionConfigurationPlatforms) = preSolution
    Debug|Any CPU = Debug|Any CPU
    Release|Any CPU = Release|Any CPU
EndGlobalSection
```

But there's no `GlobalSection(ProjectConfigurationPlatforms) = postSolution` section! That's why MSBuild isn't building any projects - it doesn't have a mapping between solution configurations and project configurations.


I should test building the projects individually first to verify they're working, then rebuild through the solution file once I've added the proper configuration mappings.
